headlines.description: — Bengals cornerback Mike Hilton, who played for the Steelers for his first four years, got his first pick-6 at any level of football against his former team late in the first half Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mixon runs for career-high 165 yards, Bengals crush Steelers

events.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers at Indianapolis Colts

headlines.description: — Tom Brady came to Indianapolis in a new uniform.
headlines.shortLinkText: Fournette scores 4 TDs, Brady rallies Bucs past Indy 38-31

headlines.description: — Tua Tagovailoa was nearly flawless. Cam Newton endured his worst statistical day as a pro. A blocked punt was returned for a touchdown.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dolphins win 4th straight, roll past Panthers 33-10

events.name: Tennessee Titans at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — The Titans ended an era for the Patriots during the 2019 season when they knocked them out of the playoffs in Tom Brady's final game in New England.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jones throws 2 TD passes, Patriots roll past Titans 36-13

events.name: Philadelphia Eagles at New York Giants

headlines.description: — Saquon Barkley believes he has spent most of the season discussing everyone else's expectations for him coming off major knee surgery.
headlines.shortLinkText: Giants' Saquon Barkley playing for himself down the stretch

headlines.description: — The Atlanta Falcons finally found some room to run, just enough to help them stay on the fringe of the NFC playoff picture.
headlines.shortLinkText: Falcons take advantage of Jaguars' mistakes in 21-14 victory

events.name: New York Jets at Houston Texans

headlines.description: — Zach Wilson wasn't satisfied with his game against the Houston Texans in his return from injury Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wilson returns, Jets end skid with 21-14 win over Texans

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at Denver Broncos

headlines.description: — Pat Surtain II showed off not only his sticky hands but his swift feet.
headlines.shortLinkText: Surtain's pair of picks leads Broncos past Chargers 28-13

events.name: Los Angeles Rams at Green Bay Packers

headlines.description: — Aaron Rodgers isn’t letting his toe injury lower his expectations even as it limits his practice time.
headlines.shortLinkText: Toe injury can't stop Rodgers as Packers defeat Rams 36-28

headlines.description: — The midseason skid that looked as though it could derail the San Francisco 49ers season is firmly in the past.
— On a night he threw a career-high four interceptions, Lamar Jackson still produced one incredible moment of brilliance.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ravens overcome Jackson's 4 INTs, beat Browns 16-10
